Tenis Fresonas is a specialized e-commer: Tenis Fresonas is a specialized e-commerce and inventory management solution developed for a digital footwear retailer to bridge the gap between social media sales and a professional storefront. The platform provides a centralized system to showcase products and manage stock in real-time through a high-end, visual catalog experience optimized for the modern market.
The technical architecture features a ro: The technical architecture features a robust cloud-based infrastructure for persistent data and image storage, complemented by a secure authentication system. I implemented advanced responsive logic to adapt the interface based on device dimensions, alongside full CRUD capabilities, dynamic search by name, and multi-criteria filtering to ensure a seamless user journey.
Librarian is a personal digital library: Librarian is a personal digital library architected to help users systematically organize their reading habits by categorizing books into custom states such as currently reading, completed, or unread. The platform serves as a comprehensive reading companion, allowing users to transition from simple book tracking to a deep, reflective reading experience through a centralized and intuitive dashboard.
The application features a robust authen: The application features a robust authentication system and full CRUD capabilities, enabling users to manage their collection, re-read titles, and add detailed personal notes to each entry. I integrated a dynamic rating and favorites system to highlight top-tier content, ensuring that every user's library feels personalized, secure, and highly organized.
Portfolio v1 is a comprehensive digital: Portfolio v1 is a comprehensive digital showcase designed to consolidate and present my growing trajectory as a software engineering student. This project served as my primary professional interface, bridging the gap between my academic learning and my full-stack development capabilities through a collection of real-world applications.
I took full ownership of the product lif: I took full ownership of the product lifecycle, from initial UI/UX conceptualization to final deployment. The platform was built with a focus on performance and clean code, ensuring a seamless cross-device experience that highlights my technical stack, including JavaScript, TypeScript, and various full-stack frameworks.
PostDestete is a specialized agricultura: PostDestete is a specialized agricultural management system developed for a commercial pig farm to monitor and analyze pig mortality rates during the critical post-weaning stage. The platform transforms raw mortality data into actionable insights, providing a centralized tool for farm administrators to track animal health trends and optimize survival rates through data-driven decisions.
The technical core of the system include: The technical core of the system includes a comprehensive CRUD engine for managing disease catalogs and mortality logs, supported by a robust analytics dashboard. I engineered an advanced reporting module that generates real-time charts and metrics, all protected by a secure authentication layer to ensure the integrity of the farm's sensitive operational data.
Pokedex is a specialized data-driven app: Pokedex is a specialized data-driven application developed to solve the information gap for competitive and casual Pokémon players during gameplay. The platform serves as a high-performance reference tool, providing instant access to critical battle data, encounter logistics, and strategic insights that help players make informed decisions in real-time.
The application leverages a comprehensiv: The application leverages a comprehensive external API to fetch and display detailed Pokémon profiles, including type weaknesses, strengths, and full move-sets categorized by level and TM/HM availability. I focused on building a highly responsive and visual experience that integrates high-quality imagery with complex data structures, ensuring a seamless search and discovery flow.
CoolStreet is a comprehensive e-commerce: CoolStreet is a comprehensive e-commerce platform developed for a specialized apparel retailer, focusing on delivering a seamless online shopping experience for high-quality shirts. The application manages the entire sales lifecycle, from product discovery through a dynamic catalog to secure checkout, providing the business with a professional and scalable digital storefront.
The technical implementation features a: The technical implementation features a full CRUD system for inventory management with cloud-hosted imagery, integrated shopping cart functionality, and an automated billing and invoicing module. To ensure global reach, I engineered a multi-language support system and a secure authentication layer, creating a robust environment for transaction processing and user data management.
The Netflix Clone is a high-performance: The Netflix Clone is a high-performance streaming interface developed as a technical challenge to replicate the seamless user experience of one of the world's most iconic digital platforms. The project focuses on real-time data synchronization and high-quality media delivery, providing a professional-grade environment for users to discover trending entertainment content.
The technical architecture integrates se: The technical architecture integrates secure user authentication with dynamic external API consumption to populate the storefront with current global trends. I implemented a detailed media view that connects directly with the YouTube API to fetch and play official trailers, ensuring an immersive and interactive browsing experience that mirrors industry standards.
Hotel Booking is a professional manageme: Hotel Booking is a professional management and reservation platform designed to streamline operations for hospitality businesses. The system provides a comprehensive solution for room inventory management, allowing administrators to handle high volumes of data while offering a seamless booking experience for potential guests.
The application features a robust admini: The application features a robust administrative engine that includes a full CRUD system for room management and a sophisticated financial reporting module to track revenue and occupancy metrics. I engineered a real-time reservation system that manages availability and booking states, ensuring a reliable and efficient workflow from initial inquiry to final check-out.
Car Rental is a high-end luxury vehicle: Car Rental is a high-end luxury vehicle management and reservation system designed to provide a premium digital experience for car rental businesses. The platform offers a sophisticated interface for showcasing an elite fleet while automating the complex logistics of high-value rentals and customer management.
The application integrates a robust auth: The application integrates a robust authentication system with a specialized reservation engine and a full CRUD inventory module for vehicle management.
